name: codex-flows-local-workspace
description: Local Codex workspace backend operation, delegation, and plugin-bundled hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a local workspace backend with delegation and hooks.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows local workspace installs skills for local backend setup, flow operation, and delegation orchestration. It also bundles passive Codex lifecycle hooks that write workspace hook-spool events. It does not automatically start or install a persistent backend service.
defaultPrompt: Set up the local Codex workspace backend.
Check workspace backend and hook status.
